title: Workspace Codegen Shipped Footprint
goal: Implement #459 by ensuring generated CLI package infrastructure stays source-checkout/development scoped rather than shipped as daily-operation runtime package payload, while intentionally shipped runtime generated adapters remain available.
non_goals: Do not remove generated command adapters used by runtime dispatch.
Do not remove command-generation work from the source checkout.
Do not publish or extract the generator package in this slice.

intent.outcome: Ordinary installed packages do not include generated CLI package infrastructure unless runtime operation requires it.
intent.constraints: Keep source-checkout maintainer checks and generated fixtures working.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest package metadata/tests/docs changes that prove the shipped boundary.
intent.escalation: Escalate if excluding a generated surface breaks an intentional runtime path.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed slice, close #459, refresh external issue evidence, then promote the next #450 child indicated by refreshed planning state.
execution.proof: package build inventory tests, contract tooling, workspace/planning/memory tests as touched, ruff, proof selector, doctor

invariants: Runtime generated command adapters remain shipped when CLIs import them.
Generated CLI package metadata remains available in the source checkout for maintainer proof.
Host repos are not asked to understand generator internals.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450: make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #460 plus #467/#469/#471 remain after this slice unless validation proves they are satisfied or superseded.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #459 closeout, refresh external evidence and promote the next #450 child indicated by validation

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Root, planning, and memory package artifacts now prove generated_cli_package metadata is source-checkout infrastructure while runtime generated_command_adapters.py stays shipped where package CLIs import it.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The package build boundary needs explicit regression tests because generated metadata directories are easy to ship accidentally.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: promote the next #450 child after external issue evidence refresh

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Keep generated CLI package infrastructure out of shipped daily-operation packages.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not break runtime CLI dispatch or maintainer source-checkout proof.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Which generated artifacts are runtime adapters versus development/proof metadata.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A generated package metadata module is required by installed runtime behavior.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Reduce shipped/default footprint rather than adding capability.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does this make ordinary installed packages smaller without weakening maintainer proof?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Audit root/planning/memory package build inventories and exclude generated_cli_package metadata modules from shipped wheels/sdists if they are not runtime-required.
invariants: Runtime generated command adapters remain shipped when CLIs import them.
Generated CLI package metadata remains available in the source checkout for maintainer proof.
Host repos are not asked to understand generator internals.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/workspace-codegen-shipped-footprint.plan.json pyproject.toml packages/planning/pyproject.toml packages/memory/pyproject.toml tests packages/planning/tests packages/memory/tests docs --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
completion_criteria: Ordinary installed packages do not include codegen infrastructure unless runtime operation requires it.
Host repos are not asked to understand generator internals.
Codegen schemas/tools/proof fixtures are labelled and packaged as development-checkout infrastructure.
Generated adapters remain usable only where intentionally exposed.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Excluded generated_cli_package metadata from root, planning, and memory wheel/sdist payloads while preserving generated_command_adapters.py as intentional runtime adapter payload.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py packages/planning/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py -q; uv run ruff check tests/test_packaging.py packages/planning/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_packaging.py packages/planning/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; cd packages/memory && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/memory && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed ... --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Plan closeout records the shipped/source-checkout boundary and package artifact tests now guard it.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): docs/source-payload-operational-install.md now states that generated_cli_package metadata is source-checkout maintainer/proof infrastructure, not shipped runtime payload.
execution_summary.resume from: refresh external issue evidence and promote the next #450 child

execution_run.what happened: Added package metadata excludes and package artifact tests so generated_cli_package development metadata is not shipped in root, planning, or memory package artifacts, while runtime generated command adapters remain included.
execution_run.scope touched: root/planning/memory pyproject package metadata, package artifact tests, source payload docs, and active planning state.
execution_run.changed surfaces: Existing packaging metadata, tests, docs, and planning surfaces were updated; no runtime command path or generated adapter API changed.
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py packages/planning/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py -q; uv run ruff check tests/test_packaging.py packages/planning/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py; uv run pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py tests/test_packaging.py packages/planning/tests/test_packaging.py packages/memory/tests/test_packaging.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py; uv run ruff check src tests packages/memory/src packages/memory/tests packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .; cd packages/memory && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q; cd packages/memory && uv run ruff check .; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed ... --format json; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning,memory --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: This slice is ready to archive and #459 can close; parent #450 remains open.
execution_run.next step: Refresh external issue evidence and promote the next #450 child.
